notes: Use approved Otis identity reference as highest-priority visual input when available.
Avoid chroma-key as the primary path because earlier probes failed background flatness.
Do not write generated outputs to public/art from this lane.

identityLock.body: slight belly, sturdy gentle stance, relaxed shoulders
identityLock.face: silver-white hair, full rounded white beard and moustache, kind tired eyes, ruddy cheeks, smile lines, mild asymmetry
identityLock.tone: soft Santa-adjacent concierge warmth without holiday costume
identityLock.newAngle: threshold keeper: he gently holds the elevator, door, or next step open for the user

outfits.label: Regular Concierge
outfits.description: Deep oxblood concierge waistcoat under a soft charcoal jacket, cream shirt, dark charcoal trousers, comfortable polished shoes, brass Tower pin, muted teal pocket square.

outfits.label: Formal Lobby Host
outfits.description: Midnight navy ceremonial concierge jacket with restrained oxblood lapel facing, brass trim, cream shirt, charcoal trousers, brass Tower pin, polished shoes.

outfits.label: After-Hours Operator
outfits.description: Cream shirt with sleeves neatly rolled, charcoal vest, mostly hidden oxblood suspenders, small key ring or slim service ledger, charcoal trousers, same shoes.

poses.promptAddOn: Relaxed front-facing three-quarter stance, shoulders slightly rounded, hands loosely folded over slight belly, gentle closed-mouth smile, natural weight shift.
Warm open-handed greeting, one hand lifted palm up as if inviting the user into the elevator or lobby, other arm relaxed, soft smile, eye contact.
Head tilted slightly with attentive eyes, one hand resting lightly near chest or jacket lapel, other relaxed by side, patient neutral mouth.
Mildly thoughtful, one hand touching the side of the beard with visible natural fingers, brows gently knit, slight smile still present.
Mid-explanation, one hand gesturing in a small calm arc, mouth slightly open, warm confident face, steady readable body.
A little taller with protective calm expression, one hand raised in a gentle wait gesture, other hand near jacket button or service ledger, concerned without panic.
Holding a slim service ledger or small tablet at waist height, focused but approachable, both hands visible and not merged with the prop.

reviewSheets.use: identity and proportion review only, not production sprite source
expression bible alignment only, not production sprite source
